"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}], "description": "### Summary
The email update functionality fails to invalidate the existing verification state when a user changes their email address, allowing a verified account to retain its verified status after switching to an unverified or unowned email address.

### Technical Details
When a user updated their email address, the system did not reset or revalidate the associated email verification status. As a result, the verification column remained set to “true” even after the email address was changed.

This allowed an attacker to:

- Verify an account using a legitimate email address
- Change the account email to an arbitrary or unowned address
- Retain the verified status without re-confirmation of the new email

No verification challenge or confirmation was required for the newly assigned email address.

### Impact
This vulnerability allows a user to associate a verified account with an email address they do not control, this may result in:

- Misrepresentation of email ownership
- Bypass of verification-based trust assumptions
- Potential abuse of features gated behind verified status

No direct unauthorized access to other users accounts or data is possible through this issue alone.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00034, "percentile": 0.1055}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-22T20:29:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44584"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-22T20:29:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Paymenter/Paymenter/security/advisories/GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Paymenter/Paymenter/security-advisories/GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Paymenter/Paymenter", "summary": "Paymenter doesn't reset email verification status after email change", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T20:29:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rv89-wch8-c574", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "paymenter/paymenter"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.5.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Paymenter doesn't reset email verification status after email change
